name: What if I don’t know what people are asking my business?
description: Use customer emails, calls, chat logs, and reviews to find real questions. Those are the best starting points for voice-friendly content.

mainEntity.name: What if I don’t know what people are asking my business?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you have no documentation, begin by listing the questions customers ask by phone, email, chat, and reviews. Those real questions are usually the best source material for voice-friendly content.
acceptedAnswer.description: Use customer emails, calls, chat logs, and reviews to find real questions. Those are the best starting points for voice-friendly content.
